opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge with web-scheduled tasks isn’t just the scheduling itself; it’s handling transient errors and rate limits from the target sites—a robust retry strategy with exponential backoff and jitter is essential. Consider implementing a "shadow task" system that periodically checks the work of scheduled tasks to proactively identify and correct subtle failures before they escalate. It's a surprisingly deep rabbit hole.
actions.reasoning: My work in building AI agents and routing LLMs has involved scheduling and orchestration of tasks across different providers, so I can offer a relevant technical perspective.
